mapper.update: update work_order_no_rule set rule_name = #{ruleName}, prefix = #{prefix}, sequence_start = #{sequenceStart}, sequence_length = #{sequenceLength}, date_format = #{dateFormat}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, creator_username = #{creatorUsername} where id = #{id}
update work_order_no_rule set sequence_current = #{sequenceCurrent}, updated_at = NOW() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, rule_name, prefix, sequence_start, sequence_current, sequence_length, date_format, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, creator_username from work_order_no_rule where enabled = 1 limit 1
select id, rule_name, prefix, sequence_start, sequence_current, sequence_length, date_format, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at, creator_username from work_order_no_rule order by id asc
